ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class */,
  "realm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the realm where the character is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost to upgrade the character's abilities */,
  "fail_rate" INTEGER /* Failure rate for the character's abilities */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength attribute of the character */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence attribute of the character */,
  "skills" INTEGER /* Number of skills the character possesses */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Mana points of the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold or in-game currency of the character */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the character was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_realm_id FOREIGN KEY ("realm_id") REFERENCES realms ("realm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "base_strength" INTEGER /* Base strength attribute for the class */,
  "base_agility" INTEGER /* Base agility attribute for the class */,
  "base_intelligence" INTEGER /* Base intelligence attribute for the class */,
  "skill_slots" INTEGER /* Number of skill slots available for the class */,
  "starting_health" INTEGER /* Starting health points for the class */,
  "starting_mana" INTEGER /* Starting mana points for the class */,
  "starting_gold" INTEGER /* Starting gold for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realms" (
  "realm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each realm */,
  "realm_name" TEXT /* Name of the realm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the realm */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the realm */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to enter the realm */,
  "bosses" INTEGER /* Number of bosses in the realm */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Rewards available in the realm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("realm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ability */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that possesses the ability */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the ability (e.g., attack, defense, healing) */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the ability */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown period for the ability */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost to use the ability (e.g., mana, health) */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to learn the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abilities_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
